ingredients: Vegetable-legume patties: 130 g, Ricotta: 80 g, Italian bread: 100 g, Courgette: 180 g, Olive oil: 9 g
instructions: Warm the patties and bread. Sauté the courgette with olive oil until tender, then serve with ricotta on the side.

dish: Apple with Ricotta and Almonds
template: Spuntino a base di frutta secca Small
ingredients: Apple: 180 g, Ricotta: 60 g, Almonds: 8 g
instructions: Slice the apple and serve it with ricotta. Sprinkle the almonds on top or enjoy them on the side.

dish: Apple and Kiwi with Ricotta and Almonds

ingredients: Apple: 150 g, Kiwi: 100 g, Ricotta: 90 g, Almonds: 10 g
instructions: Slice the apple and kiwi. Serve with ricotta on the side and finish with chopped almonds.

dish: Ricotta and Honey Toast with Pear
template: Colazione a base di latticini Medium
ingredients: Ricotta: 220 g, Wholemeal toast: 90 g, Pear: 180 g, Honey: 12 g
instructions: Toast the bread until crisp. Spread the ricotta on top, drizzle with honey, and serve with sliced pear on the side.

dish: Whole-wheat pasta with ricotta and courgette

dish: Ricotta with Apple and Crispbread
template: Spuntino a base di latticini Small
ingredients: Ricotta: 70 g, Apple: 100 g, Wholemeal crispbread: 15 g

dish: Apple and high-protein yogurt snack

dish: Ricotta with Apple and Crispbread
template: Spuntino a base di latticini Small
ingredients: Ricotta: 70 g, Apple: 120 g, Wholemeal crispbread: 15 g
instructions: Spread the ricotta on the crispbread and serve with sliced apple on the side.

dish: Apple and Ricotta Snack
template: Spuntino a base di frutta fresca Medium
ingredients: Apple: 180 g, Ricotta: 100 g, Hazelnuts: 10 g
instructions: Slice the apple and serve it with ricotta. Roughly chop the hazelnuts and sprinkle them on top.

dish: Whole-Wheat Biscuits with Ricotta, Yogurt and Banana

dish: Whole-wheat pasta with ricotta and zucchini

dish: Apple with Ricotta and Hazelnuts
template: Spuntino a base di frutta secca Small

instructions: Slice the apple and serve it with ricotta. Roughly chop the hazelnuts and sprinkle them on top.

dish: Apple and Banana with Cottage Cheese and Hazelnuts
template: Spuntino a base di frutta fresca Medium
ingredients: Apple: 120 g, Banana: 80 g, Cottage cheese: 70 g, Hazelnuts: 10 g
instructions: Slice the fruit and place it in a bowl. Add the cottage cheese on the side and finish with chopped hazelnuts.

dish: Fruit and ricotta breakfast bowl
